---
title: "#tutorials"
description: "Comprehensive tutorials in statistics and bioinformatics with R"
toc: false
title-block-style: none
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.kicker}
569 PAGES · SIXTEEN TOPIC AREAS
:::
# #tutorials
::: {.lead}
Comprehensive tutorials covering probability, inference, regression, Bayesian statistics, survival analysis, bioinformatics, and machine learning, with runnable R examples throughout.
:::
:::

## Explore by topic

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
31 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Statistical Foundations](tutorials/statistical-foundations/index.qmd)
Foundational concepts: probability, sampling, inference framework.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
25 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Descriptive Statistics](tutorials/descriptive-statistics/index.qmd)
Summarising and exploring data before modelling.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
40 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Probability Theory](tutorials/probability/index.qmd)
Axioms, distributions, expectations, and the algebra of random variables.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
45 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Inferential Statistics](tutorials/inference/index.qmd)
Hypothesis tests, confidence intervals, and the logic of inference.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
30 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Sample Size & Power](tutorials/sample-size/index.qmd)
Planning studies with adequate statistical power.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
35 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Data Visualisation](tutorials/visualisation/index.qmd)
Publication-quality graphics with ggplot2 and friends.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
51 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Regression & Modelling](tutorials/regression-modelling/index.qmd)
Linear models, GLMs, mixed models, and beyond.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
30 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Multivariate Methods](tutorials/multivariate/index.qmd)
PCA, clustering, factor analysis, discriminant analysis.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
30 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Time-Series Analysis](tutorials/time-series/index.qmd)
ARIMA, state-space, spectral, and forecasting methods.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
35 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Bayesian Statistics](tutorials/bayesian/index.qmd)
Bayesian inference, MCMC, and probabilistic programming.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
30 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Survival Analysis](tutorials/survival-analysis/index.qmd)
Censored time-to-event data: Kaplan-Meier, Cox, AFT, competing risks.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
50 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Bioinformatics](tutorials/bioinformatics/index.qmd)
Genomics pipelines from FASTQ to differential expression and beyond.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
46 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Machine Learning](tutorials/machine-learning/index.qmd)
Tree ensembles, neural networks, calibration, interpretability.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
36 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Clinical Biostatistics](tutorials/clinical-biostatistics/index.qmd)
RCT design, adaptive trials, diagnostic accuracy, agreement.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
25 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Meta-Analysis](tutorials/meta-analysis/index.qmd)
Effect-size pooling, heterogeneity, bias, network meta-analysis.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
30 TUTORIALS
:::
### [Experimental Design](tutorials/experimental-design/index.qmd)
Factorials, response surfaces, mixture designs, robust design.
:::

:::

## Applications

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
INTERACTIVE
:::
### [Decision Tree](decision-tree/index.qmd)
Interactive wizard and static chart guiding the choice of statistical test.
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
APPS
:::
### [Shiny Apps](shiny/index.qmd)
Sixteen interactive Shiny applications, one per topic area.
:::

:::

## Browse

- [Overview &mdash; filter by label, explore the tag network](overview.qmd)
- [All tutorials (A&ndash;Z)](tutorials.qmd)
- [About](about.qmd) · [Impressum](impressum.qmd)


::: {.vgwort-pixel}
```{=html}
<!-- VG Wort Zählmarke — public ID: 00f694c3171a431daf5faadea52cfd42 -->
<img src="https://vg09.met.vgwort.de/na/00f694c3171a431daf5faadea52cfd42"
     width="1" height="1" alt=""
     loading="eager"
     fetchpriority="high"
     decoding="async"
     style="position:absolute;visibility:hidden;" />
```
:::
